provider: HKU Faculty of Social Sciences official BSocSc Regulations and Syllabuses
note: The official 2025-26 BSocSc Regulations and Syllabuses publish the coded first-major structures recorded here. Uncoded cross-discipline prerequisite choices and approved exchange or overseas-summer alternatives are not fabricated as courses. Politics and Public Administration is maintained in the companion supplement, where the official department course list confirms POLI3154 as 6 credits.
